Favours are a lovely treat for your guests at their table place setting. Especially that they’re sweet too! Choose from iced biscuits, cupcakes and macarons.

Biscuits & cupcakes can be personalised. All our items are packaged in / boxes and tied with satin ribbon to coordinate with your colour palette.

wedding-bakes.main > section:nth-of-type(1) > div > p::
If a traditional tiered cake isn’t for you. How about a Sweet treat table?

Brownies, blondies, millionaires shortbread, tiffin, flapjacks, iced biscuits, cookies and cupcakes are just a few ideas for something a little different.
